summary: Iteration 20: UI/UX Overhaul testing complete. All 3 major features verified: 1) Grouped collapsible sidebar navigation, 2) POS multi-payment entry (Cash/Bank/Online/Credit simultaneously), 3) ZATCA invoicing toggle in Settings. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality (existing issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful (ss@ssc.com)
Backend: POST /api/sales with multiple payment_details (cash+bank) - creates sale correctly
Backend: POST /api/sales with all 4 payment types (cash+bank+online+credit) - works correctly
Backend: POST /api/sales with single cash payment - works correctly
Backend: GET /api/settings/company - returns vat_enabled, vat_rate fields
Backend: POST /api/settings/company with vat_enabled=true - saves ZATCA settings
Backend: POST /api/settings/company with vat_enabled=false - disables ZATCA
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - works correctly
Backend: GET /api/branches - returns branch list
Backend: GET /api/customers - returns customer list
Backend: GET /api/sales - returns sales list
Backend: GET /api/expenses - returns expenses list
Backend: GET /api/categories - returns categories list
Backend: Test data cleanup successful
Frontend: Dashboard loads with grouped sidebar
Frontend: All 7 nav groups visible (Operations, Finance, People, Stock, Reports, Assets, Admin)
Frontend: Nav group headers clickable - expand/collapse works
Frontend: Operations group expanded by default (Dashboard, Quick Entry, Live Analytics)
Frontend: Finance group expands to show Sales, Invoices, Expenses, etc.
Frontend: Navigation to Sales page works
Frontend: Navigation to Employees page works
Frontend: Navigation to Stock page works
Frontend: Navigation to Reports page works
Frontend: POS page loads with 'Quick Entry' title
Frontend: POS multi-payment section visible
Frontend: POS Cash, Bank, Online, Credit fields all shown in 2x2 grid
Frontend: POS total calculation: 100+50+25=175 (correct)
Frontend: POS total with credit: 100+50+25+30=205 (correct)
Frontend: POS Customer select appears when Credit > 0
Frontend: POS Expense mode works (amount field + category select)
Frontend: POS multi-payment sale submission successful (SAR 150 via cash,bank)
Frontend: Settings Company tab shows ZATCA Invoicing section at top
Frontend: ZATCA toggle switch visible and clickable
Frontend: ZATCA toggle starts unchecked (VAT fields hidden)
Frontend: ZATCA toggle ON reveals VAT Rate and VAT Number fields
Frontend: Save ZATCA Settings button works - shows success toast
Frontend: Mobile view shows hamburger menu button
Frontend: Mobile sidebar opens with all nav groups
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar restructure: 7 collapsible groups with clear icons and expand/collapse chevrons - excellent UX improvement
POS multi-payment: 2x2 grid layout with Cash/Bank/Online/Credit all visible simultaneously - reduces clicks
POS total calculation: Real-time sum of all payment fields - works correctly
POS Customer select: Conditional visibility when credit amount > 0 - proper UX
ZATCA toggle: Prominent Switch component at top of Company tab with orange accent styling
ZATCA conditional fields: VAT Rate and VAT Number only appear when toggle is ON
Backend sales endpoint: Properly handles payment_details array with multiple payment modes
Backend company settings: vat_enabled and vat_rate fields saved correctly
Mobile responsive: Hamburger menu triggers slide-out sidebar - works as expected
seed_data_creation: Test sales created during testing were cleaned up by test_cleanup_test_sales
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 complete. UI/UX Overhaul testing verified all 3 major changes: 1) Sidebar navigation now uses 7 collapsible groups (Operations, Finance, People, Stock, Reports, Assets, Admin) - all nav links working. 2) POS page redesigned with 4 simultaneous payment inputs (cash/bank/online/credit in 2x2 grid) - total auto-calculates, customer select appears when credit>0, sales submit successfully with payment_details array. 3) ZATCA toggle in Settings>Company tab - Switch component at top, VAT Rate/VAT Number fields appear when enabled, saves to database correctly. Mobile hamburger menu works. React hydration warning in tables is cosmetic only. Backend fully supports multi-payment sales via payment_details array.
